title: pyrola rotundifolia subsp. karakoramica
intro: Pyrola rotundifolia subsp. karakoramica, also known as Himalayan wintergreen, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing respiratory issues. The leaves of the plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
